title: Conflicting compact PR report fixture

closingIssuesReferences.body:
## Required Task Fields

```yaml
lane: validation_tooling
intelligence_level: frontier
reason: "Fixture issue supports claim-conflict detection."
durable_source_of_truth: "GitHub issue #1000"
objective: "Reject claim conflicts in compact PR reports."
allowed_paths:
  - scripts/asgk.py
expected_output:
  - compact PR report rejects conflicting claims
plan:
  - add conflict detection
checklist:
  - command fails on conflict
acceptance_sheet:
  - report fails on merge-ready claim conflict
non_goals:
  - no compact PR body default
stop_conditions:
  - claim could override tool state
rollback_expectations:
  - revert PR
```

body:
## Summary

This fixture claims merge readiness while tool-derived CI state is still blocked.

Closes #1000

## Task Reference

- GitHub issue: #1000

```yaml
  expansion_reason: none
  limits: "Fixture only."
```
